data.current_description: Calls a function registered on the device firmware.
data.description_suggestion: Invokes a function registered on the device firmware. Requires the device ID and function name as path parameters. The function executes asynchronously on the device.

data.current_description: Reads the value of a variable exposed by the device firmware.

data.current_description: Opens an SSE stream for device events.
data.description_suggestion: Opens a Server-Sent Events (SSE) stream to receive real-time device events. Accepts optional filter parameters to subscribe to specific devices or event types. Returns a continuous stream of event objects containing device ID, event name, data, and timestamp. The connection remains open until explicitly closed by the client. Requires authentication via bearer token.

Added information about optional parameters, event payload structure, persistent connection nature, and authentication requirements for better AI agent understanding of how to use this streaming endpoint.
